compliance_flags.flag: Architectural drawings ownership not explicitly stated in proposal body — standard clause implied by SOW but not surfaced in client-facing proposal text
compliance_flags.proposed_resolution: Add one sentence to proposal scope_summary confirming that architectural drawings remain property of Oficio Taller until full payment; client receives perpetual use license upon payment completion. Alternatively, rely on SOW esignature clause which establishes this under Mexican law.

notes: HOA coordination clause and covenant review clause are present and verbatim in scope-of-work.json project_type_clauses. Electronic signature clause (NOM-151-SCFI) is present. IP ownership is implied by standard Mexican architectural services law but is advisory to make explicit in the client proposal. No blocking issues — proceed to DG-05.
